metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_923
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The authors use an antibody against CtBP1 in immuno electron microscopy to study its localization in cerebellum. CtBP1 was exclusively detected in the presynaptic terminal. The images provided are consistent with an localization at the active zone(Figure 6A-E).
Of note, the detection method (secondary conjugated to peroxidase) can give somewhat diffuse signals.

The authors test specificity of the antibody using overexpression in HEK cells. A better control is provided by a latter publication (Vaithianathan et.al.), using a CtBP1 knockout.. Experimental description: Brains of adult C57/BL6 mice of mixed sex were used in all biochemical experiments and for preparation of brain slices.
